post.description:
Create a config for this account.

The caller supplies the config's key as `data.id`. Keys are unique
within an account and immutable for the lifetime of the config.

get.description:
List configs for this account.

Default sort is `key` ascending. Pass `filter[parent]=<parent_key>`
to return only the direct children of a specific config, or
`filter[search]=<term>` to filter by a case-insensitive substring
against `key` or `name`.

parameters.name: filter[search]

schema.description: Case-insensitive substring match against the config `key` and `name`. A config is returned if either field contains the search term.
schema.title: Filter[Search]

parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring match against the config `key` and `name`. A config is returned if either field contains the search term.

parameters.name: sort

schema.description: Field to sort by. Prefix with `-` for descending order. Default: `key`. Allowed values: `created_at`, `-created_at`, `key`, `-key`, `name`, `-name`, `updated_at`, `-updated_at`.
schema.title: Sort

parameters.description: Field to sort by. Prefix with `-` for descending order. Default: `key`. Allowed values: `created_at`, `-created_at`, `key`, `-key`, `name`, `-name`, `updated_at`, `-updated_at`.

parameters.name: page[number]

schema.description: 1-based page number to return. Optional; defaults to `1` when omitted. Must be `>= 1` — requests with a smaller value are rejected with a 400 error.
schema.title: Page[Number]

parameters.description: 1-based page number to return. Optional; defaults to `1` when omitted. Must be `>= 1` — requests with a smaller value are rejected with a 400 error.

parameters.name: page[size]

schema.description: Number of items per page. Optional; defaults to `1000` when omitted. Must be between `1` and `1000` inclusive — requests outside that range are rejected with a 400 error.
schema.title: Page[Size]

parameters.description: Number of items per page. Optional; defaults to `1000` when omitted. Must be between `1` and `1000` inclusive — requests outside that range are rejected with a 400 error.

parameters.name: meta[total]

schema.description: When `true`, the response's `meta.pagination` block includes `total` (the total number of matching items across all pages) and `total_pages`. Computing these requires an extra `COUNT` query, so omit (or pass `false`) when the totals are not needed. Defaults to `false`.
schema.title: Meta[Total]

parameters.description: When `true`, the response's `meta.pagination` block includes `total` (the total number of matching items across all pages) and `total_pages`. Computing these requires an extra `COUNT` query, so omit (or pass `false`) when the totals are not needed. Defaults to `false`.

get.description: Retrieve a single config by its key.

put.description: Replace a config entirely. Every writable field is overwritten.

delete.description:
Delete a config by its key.

A config that is referenced as `parent` by another config cannot be
deleted; reparent or remove the parent reference on every child
first. The `common` config cannot be deleted.

get.description: Report the current-period usage counters for this account.

parameters.name: filter[period]

schema.description: Period to report. `current` is the only supported value.
schema.title: Filter[Period]

parameters.description: Period to report. `current` is the only supported value.

parameters.name: page[number]

schema.description: 1-based page number to return. Optional; defaults to `1` when omitted. Must be `>= 1` — requests with a smaller value are rejected with a 400 error.
schema.title: Page[Number]

parameters.description: 1-based page number to return. Optional; defaults to `1` when omitted. Must be `>= 1` — requests with a smaller value are rejected with a 400 error.

parameters.name: page[size]

schema.description: Number of items per page. Optional; defaults to `1000` when omitted. Must be between `1` and `1000` inclusive — requests outside that range are rejected with a 400 error.
schema.title: Page[Size]

parameters.description: Number of items per page. Optional; defaults to `1000` when omitted. Must be between `1` and `1000` inclusive — requests outside that range are rejected with a 400 error.

parameters.name: meta[total]

schema.description: When `true`, the response's `meta.pagination` block includes `total` (the total number of matching items across all pages) and `total_pages`. Computing these requires an extra `COUNT` query, so omit (or pass `false`) when the totals are not needed. Defaults to `false`.
schema.title: Meta[Total]

parameters.description: When `true`, the response's `meta.pagination` block includes `total` (the total number of matching items across all pages) and `total_pages`. Computing these requires an extra `COUNT` query, so omit (or pass `false`) when the totals are not needed. Defaults to `false`.

200.description: Current usage for the authenticated account

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional human-readable description of what this config holds.

parent.title: Parent
parent.description: Key of another config to inherit items from. Inherited items appear as if declared on this config; locally declared items with the same key shadow them. Omit or set to `null` for a standalone config with no parent.

items.title: Items
items.description: Map of item keys to item definitions declared on this config. Keys must be unique within the config; declared types are immutable once set and must match any type declared for the same key on an ancestor.

environments.title: Environments
environments.description: Map of environment keys to per-environment override sets. An environment override applies when this config is resolved against that environment.

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: When the config was last modified.

Config.title: Config
Config.description:
A named bag of configuration items, optionally inheriting from another config.

Items are typed key/value pairs (`STRING`, `NUMBER`, `BOOLEAN`,
`JSON`). Configs may declare per-environment overrides for any item
declared on the config itself or anywhere in its inheritance chain;
resolving a config against an environment merges the chain top-down
and then applies the matching overrides.

value.title: Value
value.description: Current value for the item. May be `null` to represent a cleared (typed but unset) slot — for example, after a type change where the prior value could not be coerced.

type.title: Type
type.description: Declared value type. Constrains the JSON shape of `value` and of every override of this key in the `environments` map.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional human-readable explanation of what this item controls.

ConfigItemDefinition.title: ConfigItemDefinition
ConfigItemDefinition.description:
Type-declared item within a config.

Each item carries a value plus a declared type that constrains the
value and any per-environment overrides for the same key.

value.title: Value
value.description: Override value for this environment. Must conform to the type declared for the item in the inheritance chain.

ConfigItemOverride.title: ConfigItemOverride
ConfigItemOverride.description: Per-environment override of a single item value.

ConfigRequest.title: ConfigRequest
ConfigRequest.description: JSON:API request envelope for creating or updating a config.

ConfigResource.title: ConfigResource
ConfigResource.description:
JSON:API resource envelope for a config.

`id` is the human-readable key for the config and must be supplied
by the caller on create. It is unique within the account.

ConfigResponse.title: ConfigResponse
ConfigResponse.description: JSON:API single-resource response envelope for a config.

values.title: Values
values.description: Map of item keys to override values that apply when this environment is resolved. Each key must already be declared (with a type) on this config or one of its ancestors.

EnvironmentOverride.title: EnvironmentOverride
EnvironmentOverride.description: Per-environment override set for a config.

ListMeta.title: ListMeta
ListMeta.description: Top-level ``meta`` block included on every JSON:API list response.

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of matching items across all pages. Present only when the request included `meta[total]=true`.

total_pages.title: Total Pages
total_pages.description: Total number of pages at the requested page size. Present only when the request included `meta[total]=true`.

PaginationMeta.title: PaginationMeta
PaginationMeta.description:
Pagination block returned inside ``meta`` on every list response.

``page`` and ``size`` are always present and echo the parameters that
served the response (their defaults when the client omitted them).
``total`` and ``total_pages`` are present only when the request included
``meta[total]=true``.

limit_key.title: Limit Key
limit_key.description: Identifier of the metered limit, e.g. `config.managed_configurations` or `config.inheritance_depth`.

period.title: Period
period.description: Period the counter covers. `current` is the only supported value.

UsageAttributes.title: UsageAttributes
UsageAttributes.description: Usage counter for a single metered limit.

UsageListResponse.title: UsageListResponse
UsageListResponse.description: JSON:API collection response for usage counters.

UsageResource.title: UsageResource
UsageResource.description: JSON:API resource envelope for a usage counter.
